{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Clearblood elixirs
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Clearblood elixirs]] are pills refined from unique herbs that remove impurities from the core and blood.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Clearblood elixirs]] increase the speed of a practitioner's cycling and prepare them for advancement.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
